title: AfroPlayerTitles
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/362f052eb85c3390f26dddd429e224a238558745.png)

This plugin allows server administrators to assign special titles to players, adding a layer of personalization and recognition to their gameplay experience. Titles can be pre-configured in the settings, with full customization of their appearance, colors, and styles. The plugin also allows all messages to be tailored to fit the server's theme, ensuring seamless integration. With support for PlaceholderAPI, administrators can easily display player titles across chat, tab lists, and other server interfaces. It is a perfect solution for enhancing player engagement and creating unique gameplay dynamics.

## 📝Commands
- /afroplayertitles - Open title selector gui
- /afroplayertitles menu - Open title selector gui
- /afroplayertitles about - Informations about plugin
- /afroplayertitles reload - Reload the plugin (afroplayertitles.reload)
- /afroplayertitles add - Add title to player (afroplayertitles.add)
- /afroplayertitles remove - Remove title from player (afroplayertitles.remove)
- /afroplayertitles clear - Clear player title (afroplayertitles.clear)
- /afroplayertitles settitle - Set player title (afroplayertitles.settitle)

## 📃Permissions
- afroplayertitles.show.locked - Allow player see locked titles

## 📋Placeholders
- %afroplayertitles_title% - Return title name of player's current title
- %afroplayertitles_display% - Return display of player's current title
- %afroplayertitles_has_title% - Return "true" or "false" depending on whether player has an active title

```
Placeholders require PlaceholderAPI to work!
```

## 🌍[Documentation](https://afroplugins.gitbook.io/afroplugins-docs)
## 🎧[Discord support](https://discord.gg/3ZVBnU3PBp)
